General.Name: Joinn Laboratories China Co Ltd
General.Description: Joinn Laboratories(China)Co.,Ltd. provides preclinical and non-clinical services in the United States, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Non-Clinical Studies Services; Clinical Trial and Related Services; and Sales of Research Models. The Non-Clinical Studies Services segment offers drug safety assessment, drug metabolism and pharmacokinetics DMPK studies, and pharmacology and efficacy studies. Its Clinical Trial and Related Services segment provides clinical contract research organization services, co-managed phase I clinical research units, and bioanalytical services. The Sales of Research Models segment engages in the design, production, breeding, and sale of research models, including non-human primates and rodents. The company also offers cell-based assay (CBA) services. Joinn Laboratories(China)Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: A5 Rongjing East Street, Beijing, China, 100176
